docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,234.33 FILED BY DYSON, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYSON, DANIELLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED AUG-27-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BRYAN WIDRO FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM . FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DANIELLE DYSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB APPEARED BY ZOOM WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION. ON SAME DAY/TIME OF THE HEARING AN APPLICATION TO APPEAR BY ZOOM WAS FILED BY THE DEFENDANT IN DEPT 506 WHICH WAS REJECTED BY JPT CHANG FOR BEING UNTIMELY. THE DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN AN HOUR TO APPEAR IN COURT. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR AND A DEFAULT HEARING WAS HELD. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYSON, DANIELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 09/19/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER VACANT UNABLE TO FORWARD)
